questions: What is the relationship between load time and user behavior?
How does site speed affect bounce and conversions?
qa.answer: Slower pages increase bounce and reduce conversion. Even sub‑second delays negatively impact engagement, particularly on mobile retail journeys.
implication: Benchmark load times by critical templates (PLP, PDP, cart, checkout).
Set target budgets per page type; prioritize checkout and PDP latency first.
Continuously test speed improvements for measured conversion uplift.
